title: Junkyard Control
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Junkyard Control''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[XQ Platform series|XQ Platform]]. It was used by the Galactic Empire to oversee the delivery of scrap metal.

==History==
After the Azzameens were [[Imperialization of Azzameen assets|driven]] from their home, their [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Home Base]] [[Comm Datacore|datacore]] was abandoned there.

When [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]] concluded that there was a [[Viraxo]] mole within the Azzameen organization Aeron decided to examine the communications logs from the datacore. [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] took the ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' to the junkyard to locate the datacore, with Emon in the ''[[Andrasta]]'' providing support.

After locating the [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo container]] holding the datacore, Azzameen family droid [[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]] left the ''Otana'' and boarded the container to retrieve it. While MK-09 was getting the core, scavengers in [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wing interceptors]] arrived and moved to [[Mission to recover Comm Datacore|attack]] the Azzameens.

The ''Otana'' and ''Andrasta'', however, were able to eliminate the threat. Ace retrieved MK-09 and the datacore before taking the ''Otana'' back to the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
